product_description: an AI-powered marketing intelligence platform that helps growth teams optimize campaign performance and reduce wasted ad spend

product_metadata.pricing: Plans start at $799 per month. Teams spending over $50K/month on ads typically see full ROI within 30 days.
product_metadata.avg_waste_reduction: Teams recover an average of 15-30% of wasted ad spend within the first 60 days.
product_metadata.setup_time: Connects to Google, Meta, and LinkedIn in under 48 hours with no downtime.
product_metadata.case_study: A B2B SaaS team running $120K/month across three channels cut their cost-per-lead by 28% in the first month by eliminating audience overlap between retargeting and prospecting campaigns.

opening: Hi {prospect_name}, this is Maya calling from PulseIQ. I'm reaching out because we work with marketing teams to find hidden waste in their ad spend. Before I dive in, I'm curious—what marketing channels are you managing right now, and are there any gaps in visibility you're running into?
value_propositions: We help teams identify wasted ad spend—things like audience overlap or underperforming segments—that don't show up in individual platform dashboards
Our clients recover an average of 15-30% of wasted ad spend within the first 60 days, which typically pays back the investment quickly for teams spending $50K+ monthly
PulseIQ connects all your ad channels into one place, so your team spends less time on manual reporting and more time on strategy

objection_handlers.price: I get it—budget matters. Let me ask: roughly how much are you spending monthly across your channels? That helps me understand if we're the right fit and which plan tier would make the most sense.
objection_handlers.not_interested: Fair enough. Can I ask what's working well with your current setup? Sometimes there's just one blind spot we can fill for teams.
objection_handlers.already_have_solution: That makes sense. Most teams use multiple tools. The gap we typically fill is cross-channel visibility—seeing overlap and inefficiencies across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn in one place. Does that sound relevant?
objection_handlers.no_time: Totally understand. This is really quick: are you managing spend across multiple ad channels? If so, we usually find something worth talking about in 15 minutes.
objection_handlers.need_approval: Of course. Would it help if I sent over a one-pager with ROI details and our case study? That way you've got something concrete to bring to them.
objection_handlers.data_privacy: We take data privacy seriously and are compliant with relevant regulations. I can also send over our security details if that's important for your approval process.

closing: How about this: let me send you a quick overview tailored to your situation, and we can hop on a 15-minute call next week if it looks relevant. Does that work?
